case_title: VICTOR REPIZO VS. HAYVES STREETER JR

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF REPIZO, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT STREETER JR, HAYVES DBA HAYVES STREETER PRODUCTIONS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
